steps.title: Spot the past-time reference
steps.content: The phrase “that ran in early 2022” establishes when the exhibition occurred — a specific moment in the past. This time marker determines which verb tense belongs in the blank.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: Featured (C) uses simple past, matching “ran” in 2022. Present (A), present perfect (B), and future (D) all place the action at different times. That matches choice C — C is correct.
